## Summary

Describe the change.

## Required checks

- [ ] `git ls-files` shows no forbidden local or generated files.
- [ ] CI `contract` check passes.
- [ ] The branch name matches this work and is not reused from older work.
- [ ] The PR does not mix feature work with unrelated repository hygiene changes.
- [ ] Any privacy concern was checked against actual file contents before escalation.
- [ ] No close, merge, rebase, or force-reset action is taken without explicit user approval.
- [ ] Static demo data remains fake.
- [ ] Read-only and static modes expose no write controls.

## UX note

For dashboard work, state how the change reduces clutter and improves fast application recognition.
